equivalence_argument: No exact mapping: prepared payload construction exists, but the required reviveAgentPrepared ABI entry point is absent from the audited repos.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Canonical heartbeat revival does not submit reviveAgentPrepared(agent, precompileInput); the local port uses reviveAgent(address,bytes) and has no reviveAgentPrepared symbol or selector.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-scheduled-block-building/src/lib.rs builds a Persistent Agent precompile input from executor, fixed TTL/max spawn block, manifest CID, and encrypted DA config.
The same file encodes function reviveAgent(address agentAddr, bytes precompileInput), not reviveAgentPrepared.
crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs validates reviveAgent calldata and contains no reviveAgentPrepared selector.

notes: This is a selector/API-name gap, not a payload-shape gap: the Persistent Agent input is built off-chain.
rationale: The commit adds the reviveAgentPrepared ABI, builds the persistent-agent precompile payload locally from revival data, and changes heartbeat system transaction comments and submission paths from reviveAgent to reviveAgentPrepared. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Canonical heartbeat revival must submit reviveAgentPrepared(agent, precompileInput) transactions, not legacy reviveAgent(address) transactions, and the precompileInput must be built off-chain as a Persistent Agent payload containing the selected executor, fixed revival TTL and max spawn block, the agent's latest manifest CID, and encrypted DA config read from heartbeat storage.
suggested_falsification_tests: Force an agent into FAILED state with stored latestManifestCID and encryptedDAConfig, run canonical heartbeat processing, and assert the submitted heartbeat transaction calls reviveAgentPrepared with a precompileInput containing those storage values and no legacy reviveAgent selector.
summary: Heartbeat revival uses prepared payloads but not the required reviveAgentPrepared ABI.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Search for and call a reviveAgentPrepared selector in canonical heartbeat processing; current code only exposes reviveAgent(address,bytes).
title: Heartbeat revival uses prepared payloads
